title: Printable, low-bandwidth survivor handout pack (CC-BY)
context: A printable, low-bandwidth survivor handout pack for ewing-survivorship-late-effects, derived strictly from already dual-signed content. HIGH risk-tier patient-facing: the 'Informational, not medical advice - consult your care team' label and accessibility are re-checked in print form, and any substantive change re-enters the dual-review gate (no patient-facing page ships without BOTH a credentialed pediatric/AYA oncologist AND a patient-advocate version-scoped sign-off (neither alone suffices)).
objective: Produce a printable, low-bandwidth handout pack derived from dual-signed content, re-checking label and accessibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Derived only from already dual-signed content; every assertion retains its sourceRef
No-advice label present in print form; print accessibility/readability re-checked (grade 6-8)
Any substantive change re-enters dual review; licensed CC-BY-4.0
